requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling under TR CU 004 / GOST IEC 60335-2-24
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——TR CU 004/GOST IEC 60335-2-24下的R-600a可燃制冷剂处理
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——TR CU 004/GOST IEC 60335-2-24下的R-600a可燃製冷劑處理

summary.en: In Armenia and the wider EAEU, the flammable-refrigerant requirements for household refrigerating appliances are addressed within the safety regime — TR CU 004/2011 via GOST IEC 60335-2-24, whose Annex AA (mirroring IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA) sets the maximum R-600a (isobutane) charge per compartment configuration, ventilation, and ignition-source requirements. R-600a is a hydrocarbon refrigerant with very low GWP (≈3) and is widely used in EAEU-market household refrigerators. Manufacturers must: (1) verify the refrigerant charge complies with the GOST IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA flammability limits; (2) declare the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge quantity in grams in the product documentation and on the rating plate; and (3) include flammable-refrigerant safety markings and handling instructions in Russian. The EAEU does not operate an EU-style F-Gas phase-down scheme; because R-600a is a hydrocarbon, the EAEU obligations focus on the flammable-charge safety requirements rather than fluorinated-gas quota controls.
summary.zh: 在亚美尼亚及更广泛的EAEU，家用制冷器具的可燃制冷剂要求纳入安全制度处理——通过GOST IEC 60335-2-24适用TR CU 004/2011，其附件AA（对应IEC 60335-2-24附件AA）规定了每种隔间配置的R-600a（异丁烷）最大充注量、通风及点火源要求。R-600a是全球变暖潜能值极低（约3）的碳氢化合物制冷剂，广泛用于EAEU市场家用电冰箱。制造商须：（1）核实制冷剂充注量符合GOST IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性限值；（2）在产品文件及铭牌上声明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）以俄语提供可燃制冷剂安全标识及处理说明。EAEU不实行欧盟式的氟气体削减计划；由于R-600a为碳氢化合物，EAEU义务聚焦于可燃充注量安全要求，而非含氟气体配额管控。
summary.zht: 在亞美尼亞及更廣泛的EAEU，家用製冷器具的可燃製冷劑要求納入安全制度處理——通過GOST IEC 60335-2-24適用TR CU 004/2011，其附件AA（對應IEC 60335-2-24附件AA）規定了每種隔間配置的R-600a（異丁烷）最大充注量、通風及點火源要求。R-600a是全球暖化潛能值極低（約3）的碳氫化合物製冷劑，廣泛用於EAEU市場家用電冰箱。製造商須：（1）核實製冷劑充注量符合GOST IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性限值；（2）在產品文件及銘牌上聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）以俄語提供可燃製冷劑安全標識及處理說明。EAEU不實行歐盟式的氟氣體削減計畫；由於R-600a為碳氫化合物，EAEU義務聚焦於可燃充注量安全要求，而非含氟氣體配額管控。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — On the safety of low-voltage equipment (covers appliance-level flammable-refrigerant safety via the harmonised standard)
GOST IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex AA: Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements; interstate adoption of IEC 60335-2-24)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: higher flammability, lower toxicity)

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant charge limits for household refrigerating appliances within GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24 (the same base as the GOST version). China also regulates refrigerant safety through GB 9237 (safety requirements for refrigerating systems, aligned with ISO 5149). China operates its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (ratified June 2021, administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment), which is separate from any EAEU scheme. Chinese refrigerators already built around R-600a are well-positioned for the Armenian market on the refrigerant dimension, since both China's GB 4706.13 and Armenia's GOST IEC 60335-2-24 share the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA basis.
summary.zh: 中国在GB 4706.13-2014中处理家用制冷器具的可燃制冷剂充注量限制，其中纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24（与GOST版本同源）的R-600a可燃性规定。中国还通过GB 9237（制冷系统安全要求，参照ISO 5149）对制冷剂安全进行管理。中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入，由生态环境部管理）执行HFC削减计划，与任何EAEU计划相互独立。已围绕R-600a设计的中国电冰箱在制冷剂维度上对亚美尼亚市场条件良好，因为中国GB 4706.13与亚美尼亚GOST IEC 60335-2-24同源于IEC 60335-2-24附件AA。
summary.zht: 中國在GB 4706.13-2014中處理家用製冷器具的可燃製冷劑充注量限制，其中納入源自IEC 60335-2-24（與GOST版本同源）的R-600a可燃性規定。中國還通過GB 9237（製冷系統安全要求，參照ISO 5149）對製冷劑安全進行管理。中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入，由生態環境部管理）執行HFC削減計畫，與任何EAEU計畫相互獨立。已圍繞R-600a設計的中國電冰箱在製冷劑維度上對亞美尼亞市場條件良好，因為中國GB 4706.13與亞美尼亞GOST IEC 60335-2-24同源於IEC 60335-2-24附件AA。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable refrigerant (R-600a) charge-limit provisions in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: Because both China's GB 4706.13 and Armenia's GOST IEC 60335-2-24 share the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA basis, the technology gap for R-600a appliances is minimal; the work is mainly documentation and verification: (1) the EAEU technical file and rating plate must declare the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge weight in grams, with flammable-refrigerant safety markings and instructions in Russian; (2) the R-600a charge must be confirmed against GOST IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA maximum limits for the relevant room volume and appliance configuration — Chinese CCC test data should be checked to ensure it was generated under equivalent configurations; (3) there is no EAEU F-Gas quota system to navigate for a hydrocarbon refrigerant, so the refrigerant dimension is generally the lowest-friction part of the EAC package. Any model still using an HFC (e.g., R-134a) would need separate assessment, but is uncommon in current household refrigerator ranges.
gap.zh: 由于中国GB 4706.13与亚美尼亚GOST IEC 60335-2-24同源于IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，R-600a器具的技术差距极小；工作主要是文件和核实：（1）EAEU技术文件及铭牌须声明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克），并以俄语标注可燃制冷剂安全标识及说明；（2）须针对相关房间容积和器具配置，核实R-600a充注量符合GOST IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值——应核查中国CCC检测数据是否在等效配置下生成；（3）碳氢化合物制冷剂无须应对EAEU氟气体配额制度，因此制冷剂维度通常是EAC文件包中阻力最小的部分。任何仍使用HFC（如R-134a）的型号须单独评估，但在当前家用电冰箱系列中并不常见。
gap.zht: 由於中國GB 4706.13與亞美尼亞GOST IEC 60335-2-24同源於IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，R-600a器具的技術差距極小；工作主要是文件和核實：（1）EAEU技術文件及銘牌須聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克），並以俄語標注可燃製冷劑安全標識及說明；（2）須針對相關房間容積和器具配置，核實R-600a充注量符合GOST IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值——應核查中國CCC檢測數據是否在等效配置下生成；（3）碳氫化合物製冷劑無須應對EAEU氟氣體配額制度，因此製冷劑維度通常是EAC文件包中阻力最小的部分。任何仍使用HFC（如R-134a）的型號須單獨評估，但在當前家用電冰箱系列中並不常見。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level — R-600a charge limits and flammable-refrigerant safety per GOST IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA apply via TR CU 004/2011; no EAEU F-Gas quota scheme applies to hydrocarbon R-600a
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE — separate from EAEU

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is well-suited to the Armenian / EAEU market and is not subject to any EAEU F-Gas quota scheme. The refrigerant dimension is largely documentary: declare R-600a designation and charge weight, confirm the charge against GOST IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits, and provide Russian-language flammable-refrigerant safety markings. Because China's GB 4706.13 and Armenia's GOST IEC 60335-2-24 share the same IEC Annex AA basis, the engineering gap is minimal.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a非常适合亚美尼亚/EAEU市场，且不受任何EAEU氟气体配额制度约束。制冷剂维度主要是文件性的：声明R-600a名称及充注量、针对GOST IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值核实充注量，并提供俄语可燃制冷剂安全标识。由于中国GB 4706.13与亚美尼亚GOST IEC 60335-2-24同源于IEC附件AA，工程差距极小。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a非常適合亞美尼亞/EAEU市場，且不受任何EAEU氟氣體配額制度約束。製冷劑維度主要是文件性的：聲明R-600a名稱及充注量、針對GOST IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值核實充注量，並提供俄語可燃製冷劑安全標識。由於中國GB 4706.13與亞美尼亞GOST IEC 60335-2-24同源於IEC附件AA，工程差距極小。
